title: K-th Symbol in Grammar
hints: Notice that each symbol in a row generates two symbols in the next row. Which parent symbol at position ceil(K/2) in the previous row determines the value at K?
This structure forms a binary tree where the root is 0. The value at any node depends on its parent and whether it is a left or right child.
The value flips if the path from the root to the node contains an odd number of right turns (or 1-bits in the zero-indexed path).
